evidence: The supplied build at builds/protobuf-asan-arm64 does not contain the Python extension path from targets/protobuf/python/unknown_fields.c. No _message module was found, nm on libupbd.a showed no PyUpb_UnknownFieldSet symbols, and a debug-only link probe failed with an undefined reference to _PyUpb_UnknownFieldSet_NewBare. LLDB state capture cannot proceed until a Python-extension build is provided.
